description_long: This is a single-story modern house with a rectangular footprint, set on a grassy plot. The front facade features a full wall of large blue-tinted glass windows, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The roof is a sloped shed style, finished in a dark brown material and fitted with three solar panels, indicating an eco-friendly design. The rear of the house has a small staircase leading to a secondary entrance, and several standard-sized windows are distributed along the sides and back. The main entryway is slightly elevated with a short set of steps and a simple overhang. The exterior walls are a light beige color, contrasting with the dark roof and blue windows.
description: A modern, single-story house with a sloped brown roof, large blue glass windows on the front, and solar panels on top. The structure features beige walls, a main entry with steps, and a rear staircase.
description_view_0: Front view showing a full wall of blue-tinted glass windows, the main entryway with steps, and the sloped brown roof with solar panels.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sloped roof, a large window, and the beige wall; the solar panels are visible on the roof.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a secondary entrance with a staircase, two standard windows, and the brown roof with solar panels.
description_view_3: Angled view of the glass-fronted facade and the sloped roof, emphasizing the modern design and blue windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: large picture windows on front, asymmetrical standard windows on sides and rear
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with short steps, simple overhang, and a single door adjacent to the glass facade
